title: What is the connection between the exile (with a particular emphasis on mechanics) and the silence of god?
body:
# exile and the silence of God 
- a review of the mechanics of the exile would be helpful here 
- the way that these mechanics affect the experience of a human 
- the way that the experience of a human is dependent upon anthropomeriological configurations under the influence of heavenly winds or spirits (circa concepts like the spirit that is now at work in the sons of disobedience) 
- we'll need to revisit questions like what does it mean that Satan has a kingdom and how does he exercise kingship ontologically?
excerpt: # exile and the silence of God
